nasb.text: So Israel set out with all that he had, and came to Beersheba, and offered sacrifices to the God of his father Isaac.

esv.text: So Israel took his journey with all that he had and came to Beersheba, and offered sacrifices to the God of his father Isaac.

cnv.text: 以色列帶著他所有的一切起程，到了別是巴，就向他父親以撒的　神獻祭。

ccb.text: 以色列带着他所有的一切来到别示巴，向他父亲以撒的上帝献祭。

csbs.text: 以色列带着一切属于他的出发了。他来到比尔-谢巴，向他父亲以撒的神献上祭物。
